note: Baseline statique — mesure en DB non disponible sans accès shell prod. Commandes pour obtenir les valeurs réelles ci-dessous.

baseline_commands.idempotency: python manage.py shell -c "from suddenly.activitypub.models import ProcessedActivity; print(ProcessedActivity.objects.count())"
baseline_commands.public_key_cache: python manage.py shell -c "from suddenly.activitypub.models import PublicKeyCache; print(PublicKeyCache.objects.count())"
baseline_commands.federated_servers: python manage.py shell -c "from suddenly.activitypub.models import FederatedServer; print(FederatedServer.objects.count())"
